$meta.source: QuantDesk example config. Copy to ~/.quantdesk/config.json, or set $QUANTDESK_CONFIG to the path of this file, or drop it at <repo>/.quantdesk/config.json for walk-up discovery. All fields are optional — delete anything you do not need. Env vars (DATABASE_URL, PORT, LOG_LEVEL, AGENT_MODEL, HOST, QUANTDESK_LOG_DIR) still win over anything declared here.
